title: lastrea beddomei
intro: Lastrea beddomei, also known as the Beddome's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lastrea beddomei include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
